ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being ranked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of ranking */,
  "world_rank" INTEGER /* World rank */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National rank */,
  "quality_of_education" REAL /* Quality of education score */,
  "alumni_employment" REAL /* Alumni employment score */,
  "quality_of_faculty" REAL /* Quality of faculty score */,
  "publications" REAL /* Publications score */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence score */,
  "citations" REAL /* Citations score */,
  "broad_impact" REAL /* Broad impact score */,
  "patents" INTEGER /* Number of patents */,
  "score" REAL /* Overall score */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ranking criterion */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the ranking methodology */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., quality of education, alumni employment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the criterion in the ranking */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "university1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first university in the partnership */,
  "university2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second university in the partnership */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of partnership (e.g., research collaboration, student exchange) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the partnership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is verified */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Specific role of the administrator */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of citation */,
  "citing_publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cited this one */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or snippet of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university that owns the patent */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of patent */,
  "patent_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the patent */,
  "inventors" TEXT /* Names of the inventors */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "project" TEXT /* Project name of the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grants" (
  "grant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grant */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who received the grant */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the grant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of grant */,
  "grantor" TEXT /* Name of the organization granting the award */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the grant */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the grant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grants_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who received the award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of award */,
  "awarding_institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution awarding the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university mentioned in the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the news article */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)
